mapper.sql: f.id, f.park_id, p.name AS park_name, f.building_id, b.name AS building_name, f.floor_no, f.area, f.status, f.memo, f.create_by, f.create_time, f.update_by, f.update_time
mapper.select: SELECT , COALESCE(rs.used_area, 0) AS used_area FROM ics_floor f LEFT JOIN ics_building b ON b.id = f.building_id LEFT JOIN ics_park p ON p.id = f.park_id LEFT JOIN ( SELECT building_id, floor, SUM(COALESCE(area, 0)) AS used_area FROM ics_room GROUP BY building_id, floor ) rs ON rs.building_id = f.building_id AND rs.floor = f.floor_no WHERE f.building_id = #{buildingId} AND f.floor_no = #{floorNo} ORDER BY f.id ASC LIMIT 1
SELECT f.floor_no AS floorNo, f.area FROM ics_floor f WHERE f.building_id = #{buildingId} ORDER BY f.floor_no ASC
